name: Nihon Seimitsu Co., Ltd.
summary: Nihon Seimitsu Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells wrist watch bands, eyeglass frames, and other products in Japan. The company offers carbide ceramic and pure titanium wrist watch, metal, and urethane bands, as well as bezels. It also provides fishing tackles, static electricity eliminators, and electronic locks, as well as ion plating services. The company was founded in 1978 and is headquartered in Kawaguchi, Japan.
